name: list_assigned_jira_tickets
description: Lists Jira tickets assigned to one or more users, grouped by User then by Project, sorted by priority. Includes a dedicated highlight section at the bottom showing tickets updated within a recent window (default: last 1 day). Accepts an optional date range (default: last 30 days) and optional filters for user, project, and status. Invoke this agent when you want a comprehensive overview of active work plus immediate visibility into daily progress.
